variables.notes: R:c. Selected the minimal apparent current debt components excluding leases. Manual review needed because overlap between 'Debt to Credit Institutions', 'Other Short Term Interest Bearing Debt', and possible 'Overdraft' cannot be ruled out from the preview alone.
